findings.finding: Content is complete and pedagogically sound. 4 content blocks with good progression from problem to solution.
findings.details: Lesson uses the library metaphor effectively. Covers persistence concepts well for beginners.

findings.finding: Comprehensive SQL fundamentals. 7 content blocks covering CREATE TABLE, data types, INSERT, SELECT.
findings.details: Good coverage of SQL basics. Warning block appropriately addresses production concerns.

findings.finding: Complete coverage of WHERE, ORDER BY, aggregate functions, and GROUP BY. 6 content blocks.
findings.details: Good query performance warning included. Query execution order key point is valuable.

findings.finding: Excellent coverage of INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, and many-to-many relationships. 7 content blocks.
findings.details: Visual puzzle piece analogy helps understanding. N+1 query problem and CARTESIAN PRODUCT warnings are important.

findings.finding: Modern JDBC patterns covered. 8 content blocks with good coverage of try-with-resources.
findings.details: Properly emphasizes PreparedStatement for SQL injection prevention. Connection pooling mentioned appropriately.

findings.lessonTitle: JPA and Hibernate - The ORM Solution
findings.finding: Uses jakarta.persistence.* imports - correct for JPA 3.x/Hibernate 6.x
findings.details: JPA annotations @Entity, @Table, @Id, @GeneratedValue, @Column all shown correctly. No javax.persistence references found.

findings.finding: Comprehensive Flyway coverage. 8 content blocks including migration naming conventions.
findings.details: Good best practices section. Covers backward compatibility concerns appropriately.

findings.finding: lesson.json properly formatted with all required fields
findings.details: id, title, description, moduleId, order, estimatedMinutes, difficulty all present
